name: quarryfi-time-tracker
description: quarryFi R&D time tracking for OpenAI Codex — automated tax credit documentation

interface.shortDescription: Track R&D time in Codex for tax credit documentation
interface.longDescription: Automatically tracks coding sessions in Codex CLI and Codex App, sending heartbeats to your quarryFi account for R&D tax credit qualification analysis. Uses the same ~/.quarryfi/config.json as the Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Check my quarryFi R&D tracking status
